description_long: This is a floor-standing base cabinet with a luxurious marble or stone top and a body constructed from richly finished wood. The front and sides feature subtle vertical accents, possibly in a darker wood or metal, adding a touch of Art Deco or mid-century modern style. The base is slightly recessed and finished in a contrasting lighter wood or brass-like material, giving the cabinet a floating appearance. The top surface is smooth, flat, and expansive, suitable for supporting objects or serving as a countertop. No visible handles or hardware are present, suggesting a minimalist design with either push-to-open doors or integrated finger grooves. The back is plain, indicating it is meant to be placed against a wall.
description: A floor-standing base cabinet with a marble top and wood body, featuring minimalist vertical accents and a recessed base. The design is sleek and modern, with no visible hardware.
description_view_0: Front view showing the marble top, wood body, and vertical accent details with a recessed base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the cabinet's depth, marble top overhang, and the continuation of the vertical accent.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wood back and the full width of the marble top and base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the features of the other side with visible marble overhang and vertical accent.
